_comment: Pool of 8 Playwright MCP server instances. Each slot spawns its own Node process with its own Chromium browser, so the swarm can dispatch up to 8 sub-agents in parallel and each gets a fully isolated browser. Bump the slot count by adding more `playwright-pool-N` entries below if you routinely evaluate manifests with > 8 cases. Each idle slot is a sleeping Node process; Chromium is launched lazily on first navigate.
